---
name: Bug report
about: Create a report to help us improve the Home Automation system
title: ''
labels: bug
assignees: ''

---

**Describe the bug**
A clear and concise description of what the bug is. (e.g. The fan speed slider doesn't update the hardware when on level 3)

**To Reproduce**
Steps to reproduce the behavior:
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '....'
3. See error

**Expected behavior**
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

**Hardware Information (please complete the following information):**
 - Device: [e.g. ATmega8A, ESP-01S, Android 13 smartphone]
 - Firmware Version: [e.g. FV5.1.0]
 - App Version: [e.g. 5.1.0]

**Additional context**
Add any other context about the problem here (e.g. Serial monitor logs from the ESP-01S).
